breakdown: This PR refactors rewards box normalization to use a robust key fallback extraction helper and centralized numeric conversion. The changes add defensive handling for edge cases (empty strings, zeros, NaN, Inf) when parsing LLM-generated payloads. Quality is solid: tests are comprehensive covering both unit and E2E scenarios, but扣分 points for cryptic `_DNC` acronym without expansion, return type `Any` on the helper function, and missing docstrings on public production functions.
key_changes: Refactored rewards normalization with new `_get_raw(keys)` helper for robust multi-key fallback extraction
Integrated `_DNC.convert_value()` for centralized numeric conversion with fallbacks
Added defensive handling for edge cases (empty strings, zero, NaN, Inf) by continuing search for valid values
Created new test_rewards_box_robustness.py with both internal unit tests and E2E hallucination tests
Changed default behavior for missing XP tracking fields to 0 (not DNC game-state defaults like 300)
